section_name: Operator use of commercial mobile radio services and electronic communications devices
text: Regulation of operator or passenger use of commercial mobile radio services and other electronic communications devices in a motor vehicle is expressly preempted to the state.
markdown:
### Chapter 316. State Unif. Traffic Control
##### § 316.0075 — Operator use of commercial mobile radio services and electronic communications devices

Regulation of operator or passenger use of commercial mobile radio services and other electronic communications devices in a motor vehicle is expressly preempted to the state.

subsections.text: Regulation of operator or passenger use of commercial mobile radio services and other electronic communications devices in a motor vehicle is expressly preempted to the state.
